message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "protection": "Clear definition of performance metrics and penalties for underperformance",
      "why_missing": "The contract lacks specific performance metrics and penalties for the Developer in case of failure to meet the agreed-upon specifications or deadlines.",
      "risk": "Without clear performance metrics and penalties, the Company may face delays and inadequate software delivery without recourse to enforce accountability.",
      "mitigation": "Include specific performance metrics that the Developer must meet and outline penalties for failing to meet these metrics.",
      "suggested_clause": "The Developer shall meet the following performance metrics: [insert specific metrics]. In the event of failure to meet these metrics, the Developer shall incur a penalty of [insert penalty details].",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.11",
      "source_clause_id": "f5e0cb07-9c1b-481d-9b70-9bed8869e675",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon passing the acceptance test, Company shall pay to Developer an additional ……. [insert number] % of the price of the phase, Developer was paid [%] for the delivery of the programs, Company shall pay to Developer ……. [insert number] % for the passing of the Acceptance Test.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "protection": "Defined timeline for acceptance testing and consequences for delays",
      "why_missing": "The contract does not specify a timeline for acceptance testing or the consequences if the Developer fails to deliver the software on time.",
      "risk": "Without a defined timeline, the acceptance testing process may be delayed indefinitely, affecting the overall project timeline and budget.",
      "mitigation": "Establish a clear timeline for acceptance testing and outline consequences for delays in delivery or acceptance.",
      "suggested_clause": "The acceptance testing shall be completed within [insert number] days of delivery. If the Developer fails to deliver on time, the Company may impose a penalty of [insert penalty details].",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.12",
      "source_clause_id": "65a8de99-bd28-4e5d-97f4-ca189e42ae59",
      "source_excerpt": "If the programs fail to perfom the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "protection": "Intellectual property rights and ownership of developed software",
      "why_missing": "The contract does not clearly state the ownership of the intellectual property rights for the software developed.",
      "risk": "Without clear ownership clauses, the Company may face challenges in using or modifying the software after the contract ends.",
      "mitigation": "Include a clause that clearly states that all intellectual property rights for the developed software shall belong to the Company upon payment.",
      "suggested_clause": "All intellectual property rights for the software developed under this Agreement shall be owned by the Company upon full payment to the Developer.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.1",
      "source_clause_id": "006d9839-ccae-4427-b454-0b1e923548a5",
      "source_excerpt": "Developer shall consult with Company personnel for the purpose of designing programming specifications.",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "protection": "Dispute resolution mechanism",
      "why_missing": "The contract lacks a defined process for resolving disputes that may arise during the execution of the agreement.",
      "risk": "In the absence of a dispute resolution mechanism, conflicts may escalate, leading to prolonged negotiations or litigation.",
      "mitigation": "Incorporate a dispute resolution clause that outlines the process for mediation or arbitration before resorting to litigation.",
      "suggested_clause": "In the event of a dispute arising from this Agreement, the parties agree to first attempt to resolve the dispute through mediation. If mediation is unsuccessful, the parties agree to submit the dispute to binding arbitration.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "1d3092a3-4144-4005-a6d7-edb54adbe06f",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    }
  ]
}
